summary: M6 opt-in contract delivered as policy-convergence-evidence-repo.json. Defines SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED (default off), SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_MODE (default postgres), SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_DRY_RUN (default 1), allowed tables, write semantics (mirrorOnly, idempotentUpsert, canonicalWritesAlwaysFalse), error handling (continueOnError), and 7 guards. All thresholds, modes, and destinations are data-driven. enabledByDefault=false.

artifacts.description: Opt-in contract policy. Defines env vars for enable/mode/dry-run, allowedTables (6 tables), writeSemantics, roundWritePolicy, runWritePolicy, errorHandling, and 7 guards. smokeTestCommand referenced for CI integration.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Explicit opt-in contract with CLI/env flags, defaults, kill switch, dry-run semantics, allowed artifact classes
PostgreSQL and vector backends are mirrors/smoke only; no direct provider dependency
All thresholds, modes, and destinations data-driven, not hardcoded in runner
acceptanceMapping.evidence: policy.repoMode/dryRun/roundWritePolicy/errorHandling all env-var or policy-file driven; guards list no-hardcoded-general-id-or-source-id, no-hardcoded-dsn-or-schema-or-namespace
policy.optIn: set env var to '0' or unset disables; policy.errorHandling.continueOnError=true; policy.guards: mirror-only-read-path-not-flipped prevents irreversible cutover

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0602: implement convergence_evidence_seam.py using this contract
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0603: integrate EvidenceManifest writing and resume scan into convergence loop
